lines.en: Good morning. How can I help you today?
lines.zh: 早上好。今天有什么可以帮您的？

lines.en: I have a few items that need dry cleaning.
lines.zh: 我有几件衣服需要干洗。

lines.en: No problem. Let me take a look at them.
This is a wool coat, and these are two silk blouses.
lines.zh: 这是一件羊毛大衣，这两件是丝绸衬衫。

lines.en: I see. Do you have any stains you want me to pay special attention to?
lines.zh: 明白了。有没有什么污渍需要我特别注意的？

lines.en: Yes, there's a coffee stain on the sleeve of the coat.
lines.zh: 有的，大衣袖子上有一个咖啡渍。

lines.en: I'll make a note of that. We'll do our best to remove it.
lines.zh: 我会记下来。我们会尽力去除的。

lines.en: When can I pick them up?
They'll be ready by Thursday after three o'clock.
lines.zh: 周四下午三点以后就可以来取了。
